name: Waigali

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Nuristani Kalasha (waig1243).

notes: Skeleton. Waigali (Kalasha-ala), a Nuristani (Indo-European) language of Afghanistan. There is no standardized Latin orthography; this map covers the romanized linguistic transcription commonly used for the language, with under-dot letters for the retroflex series (ṭ ḍ ṇ ṛ ṣ ẓ), haček letters for postalveolars (č ǰ š ž) and macron vowels for length. Dentals t/d are [t̪ d̪]. Transcription practice varies between sources; vowel nasalization and any accent are typically untranscribed and are left unencoded.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Nuristani Kalasha (waig1243)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
